{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Iron Ruler
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] reached an [[Iron Ruler]] holding a [[sword]] and shield.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
